programme.title: E20 - Let's Play Cinema
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: E7 - When Two Hearts Meet
programme.desc: Florence realises that Leon fancies her and she helps him to go through Francis's archives in search of information about Marianne. Leon discovers that his mother had been hiding an enormous secret.

programme.title: Telematin:2025-2026
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E8 - Temple Monkeys on the Run
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman Langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. But the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E3 - Dinos, Ducks & More Animal Friends!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he meets dinos, ducks & more animal friends! First, he & his friends visit Old MacDonald's farm to learn about all the animals & count all his vegetables. Then, after finding different animal toys inside surprise eggs, Baby John & his friends have fun mixing them up & creating their own crazy creatures! The animal fun continues as Miss Hannah uses a fun deck of cards to teach the kids about animals & the sounds they make.

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month by helping out! First, JJ assumes the role of a pretend doctor, taking care of TomTom & YoYo with a checkup & lollipops. Then, the siblings team up with Daddy to bake a special cake for Mom! The helpfulness continues as they wash a dirty car together after a soccer game & TomTom helps JJ learn to use the potty. Plus, join the family on a nature walk with Bingo to learn about animals & nature!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month by helping out! First, JJ assumes the role of a pretend doctor, taking care of TomTom & YoYo with a checkup & lollipops. Then, the siblings team up with Daddy to bake a special cake for Mom! The helpfulness continues as they wash a dirty car together after a soccer game & TomTom helps JJ learn to use the potty. Plus, join the family on a nature walk with Bingo to learn about animals & nature!

The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month by helping out! First, JJ assumes the role of a pretend doctor, taking care of TomTom & YoYo with a checkup & lollipops. Then, the siblings team up with Daddy to bake a special cake for Mom! The helpfulness continues as they wash a dirty car together after a soccer game & TomTom helps JJ learn to use the potty. Plus, join the family on a nature walk with Bingo to learn about animals & nature!

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E3 - Nusfjord Arctic Resort, Norway
programme.desc: Nusfjord Arctic Resort is a preserved 200-year-old cod fishing village in the Lofoten Islands of Norway. Working alongside the dedicated team, Monica and Rob learn to appreciate the difficulties of running a high-end resort in such an extreme environment.

programme.desc: Donal brings us four internationally inspired-bowls - a Citrus Pork Bowl; a Chicken Katsu Bowl; Tomato & Chickpea Orecchiette Soup; and a Middle Eastern Lamb Bowl.

programme.desc: Nisha Katona is cooking a spicy egg and cauliflower curry, a Himalayan chilli and cheese toastie with tamarind chutney and some sweet Hungarian plum dumplings.

programme.desc: In New York we visit a hotel hidden airside amongst the hustle and bustle of the John F Kennedy airport - the TWA Hotel. In Finnish Lapland we venture to the deep snow-capped forest of the Urho Kkonen National Park.

programme.title: E2

Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: Jam and Cake Roll
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula make a delicious jam and cake roll with eggs, sugar, flour, strawberry marmalade, shredded coconut, and whipped cream.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: Trip to Jordan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo clash over their school show poster-Zoe colors while Milo writes the title. Alim suggests writing from the right, surprising them. In Jordan, they meet Souria preparing a puppet show and learn to write Arabic... from right to left!

programme.title: Plastic Bag
programme.desc: Why throw the plastic bags away? Upcycling and reusing are Hepi and Briko's favourite things to do.

programme.title: The Static-y Shuffle Stumper
programme.desc: When Tess and Alex suddenly start getting electric shocks for no apparent reason, Addison has to solve the mystery or it will be lights out on their act for the school talent competition.

programme.title: Sibling Love
programme.desc: Bhilka wakes up to a terrible noise. DiktaThor and Cleopatra are fighting for power. Sprinter is on the case, both saving the city and creating peace between the two villains, who turn out to be nothing less than sibling rivalry!

programme.title: Oto Flips
programme.desc: Determined to win a shiny trophy of his own, Oto decides to attempt a world record for the biggest pancake. But can he really make it all by himself? The team sets off to a pancake festival at a Sugarbush in Quebec, Canada, to find out!

programme.title: Field of Giants
programme.desc: Fontaine and Smiling Finn get stuck inside a closing giant clam as the pirates battle the Nektons for the pearl within!

programme.title: A Tornado in a Bottle
programme.desc: Eric pretends to be a tornado. He finds out they happen when the wind starts rotating really fast in a vortex – a whirlpool shape. Then he learns how to make a tornado using recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... The Moon
programme.desc: Henry meets the Moon. He learns all about space, astronauts and even that the Moon loves cheese and crackers.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Sock
programme.desc: Henry meets Left Sock, and follows clues to locate his best friend, Right Sock!

programme.title: The Trouble with Truffles
programme.desc: What are truffles, anyway? And if they're so rare, how do we find some? Doki, Gabi, Mundi and Fico head to the Tuscany region of Italy, to borrow a comically lazy truffle hunting dog, and try to snuffle up a new truffle!

programme.title: The Static-y Shuffle Stumper
programme.desc: When Tess and Alex suddenly start getting electric shocks for no apparent reason, Addison has to solve the mystery or it will be lights out on their act for the school talent competition.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: China vs Brazil - Uruguay Day 2, Women
Mixed Doubles Final Gadecki/Peers v Mladenovic/Guinard

programme.title: Europe Early Edition
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day's session.

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC's “Worldwide Exchange” delivers essential, actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Morgan Brennan, the program prepares CNBC's worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Searching For Clues - Donations For Islamist Terrorism?
programme.desc: Islamist terrorism continues to claim numerous victims worldwide. Extremist networks are financed in part by donations from Germany. But investigations often prove to be difficult.

programme.title: The Worldwide Materials Transition
programme.desc: From Venezuela's extra heavy crude oil to Trump's focus on Greenland's rare earths to Germany's F60 steel giants and illegal gold mines in Indonesia: How raw materials impact landscapes, people, and politics.

programme.title: How To Build Homes That Better Survive Disasters?
programme.desc: After hurricanes, floods, or wildfires, we often see 'miracle houses” - standing strong while others break. What's the secret behind their survival? We look at different types of buildings for these types of extreme weather events.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: Mumbai Fishers Battle Climate Change And Modernization
programme.desc: In Mumbai, climate change is eroding trust among the Koli fishing community. Plus: In Cambodia, rising heat and flooding disrupt children's education.

programme.title: Svalbard: Russia's Arctic 'Trump Card' Against Nato
programme.desc: The remote island group of Svalbard - it is NATO territory but a hundred-year-old treaty grants access to dozens of countries - including Russia. And Russia is using it to build up a strategic foothold in the Arctic.

programme.title: Uganda's Urban Water Fix: Low-Cost Tech That Cleans Groundwater
programme.desc: A low-cost technology is being used to purify groundwater and recycled wastewater in Uganda. Also: Urban Nigerians embrace sack farming.

programme.title: Mumbai Fishers Battle Climate Change And Modernization
programme.desc: In Mumbai, climate change is eroding trust among the Koli fishing community. Plus: In Cambodia, rising heat and flooding disrupt children's education.

programme.desc: Sweden has one of the most restrictive migration policies in Europe, hitting young people especially hard. +++ Russia's war has turned Ukrainians into drone experts. And the West seeks to benefit from their knowledge.

programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Blind Youth In Delhi Use Acroyoga To Overcome Exclusion
programme.desc: In Delhi, visually impaired youth deal with exclusion and fear in a chaotic city. But through acroyoga, they build trust and confidence, defying disability and societal neglect. Yoga helps them connect with their bodies and reclaim visibility in a world that often overlooks them.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

programme.title: Mercedes: Iconic German Brand Or Three-Pointed Fallen Star?
programme.desc: Pummeled by Trump's tariffs and fierce competition in China, Mercedes-Benz's operating profits plunged in 2025. Why is its CEO upbeat? Plus: How e-bikes are making Ugandans life easier and test driving Kia's PV5.

programme.desc: Islamist terrorism continues to claim numerous victims worldwide. Extremist networks are financed in part by donations from Germany. But investigations often prove to be difficult.

programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Karl and Tina: Embracing Village Life In Japan 'Autumn & Winter 2025'
programme.desc: German architect Karl and his wife Tina, who is good at cooking and gardening, have revived many abandoned houses in the marginal village in Niigata Prefecture. New comers increased as they were attracted to the beautiful old folk houses in the village and they also start to deepen exchanges with the local people. The program depicts the lives of people who are connecting with each other in their affluent nature.

programme.title: Spanish In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E111 - The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: E724 - George's Wooly Hat
programme.desc: George has a new hat and Mummy Pig is determined that George doesn't get it muddy when visiting Grandpa and Granny Pig.

programme.title: E816 - Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: E103 - The Driving Force
programme.desc: When Starla the friendly cowgirl truck loses one of her pistons, Blaze and AJ set out to get it back. But they'll have to hurry before Crusher gets his greedy tires on it!

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E106 - New Rocket
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: E816 - Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa / Pups Save A Lemon-Loving Duckling
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa! // A lemon-loving baby duckling from Yumi's Farm gets mixed up in a delivery to Lizzy's Lemonade Shoppe.

programme.title: E106 - The Little Axolotl / Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa / Pups Save A Lemon-Loving Duckling
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa! // A lemon-loving baby duckling from Yumi's Farm gets mixed up in a delivery to Lizzy's Lemonade Shoppe.

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E103 - The Driving Force
programme.desc: When Starla the friendly cowgirl truck loses one of her pistons, Blaze and AJ set out to get it back. But they'll have to hurry before Crusher gets his greedy tires on it!

programme.title: E127 - Windy Castle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the Windy Castle, and when they get there, they have a wonderful view from the top.

programme.title: E730 - Soft Play
programme.desc: It's Richard Rabbit's birthday party and George is invited, and that can only mean one thing; Soft Play!

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E319 - Pups Get Growing / Pups Save A Space Toy
programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce! // The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy!

programme.title: E201 - Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E201 - Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E36 - Bean Painting/Wrestle Bean/Rare Bird/Bean's Safari/A Round Of Golf
programme.desc: Mr Bean has painted his room bright green. But will Mrs Wicket approve?

programme.title: E59 - Time Crimes/Lost Playground
programme.desc: When Clarence is convinced he has the power to manipulate time, he vows to only use his 'abilities' for good. However, a day at school puts his morals to the test when he's given the ultimate choice - to help his friends or pause time in the name of fun.

programme.title: E113 - Taziator / Marvin Flag Gag: Little Martian / Climate Control/Lepreconned / Marvin Fla
programme.desc: Bugs faces off against Taz in the Roman Colosseum.

programme.title: E39 - A. The Kids/The Fan/The Coach/The Joy/The Recipe
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are showing no signs of growing up.

programme.title: E40 - On the Run/Horror Club/Maximum Capacity
programme.desc: Steven and Amethyst try out life on the road.

programme.title: E41 - Superhero Bean/What A Load Of Rubbish/The Robot/Ice Cream/Birthday Party
programme.desc: Bean turns superhero in an attempt to outwit a cunning cat burglar.

programme.title: E17 - Mechanizer World
programme.desc: Amato's Mechanizer has been taken over by King Boxell. To stop him, the kids have to enter the digital Mechanizer World.

programme.title: E290 - Spatula of the Heavens
programme.desc: SpongeBob embarks on an epic journey to have his beloved spatula reforged by the legendary Guru Greasetrap.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E122 - Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It’s the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln’s sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E104 - Villains' Night

programme.title: E204 - The Island
programme.desc: The Mutanimals turn on the Ninja Turtles after Ray Fillet accuses them of attacking him in Central Park! The Turtles realize a mutant snapping turtle named Tokka is on the loose, drawing Donnie to a terrifying laboratory on Staten Island!

programme.title: E290 - Gary's Playhouse

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Whilst humans are prone to fighting the inevitability of ageing, trees have perfected the art of aging gracefully. In this episode, we will discover how mature trees do incredible things to thrive in an often turbulent world, and may even work together to do so.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: A brilliant medical engineer and a veteran astronaut go on a seemingly routine spacewalk that ends up in a huge disaster.

programme.title: E6 - 奔赴南迦巴瓦峰 真誠守候日照金山
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 以近未來科幻安全危機為背景，講述了來自狂風特勤學院的曾經師徒二人姜振和白帆，在紫晶集團中邊敵對邊掩護彼此身份，姜振為意外車禍逝去的妹妹查明真相，並與白帆一同破解控制殘疾人大腦的暗黑科技公司，幫弱者脫離險境討回公道的故事。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖江蘇傳統體育魅力
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E10 - 驚喜樂園即將關閉
programme.desc: 30組新銳潮玩設計師帶著自己的原創IP，與高瀚宇、何廣智、賴美雲、謝可寅、周揚青、周震南組成3組潮玩工作室，經歷一系列主題創作，在創意與設計中不斷挑戰自我、團結協作，用繪畫表達語言，賦予這些潮流新興IP更具生命力的藝術價值，也讓更多「隱藏款」原創IP和寶藏設計師被看到。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖江蘇傳統體育魅力
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: E3 - 攜手踏上茶馬古道
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E3 - 攜手踏上茶馬古道

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: Discovering the treasures of the French regions, the initiatives and people who bring them to life.

programme.title: E3 - Philippe Hardy's Manche
programme.desc: In the Bay of Mont-Saint-Michel, Michelin-starred chef Philippe Hardy takes us to explore the terroir of his Normandy. From the kitchens of his restaurant Le Mascaret, to the markets selling scallops, we join him in discovering local gastronomy and all its delights.

programme.title: E18 - In Chinon (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's truffles and its cheeses.

programme.title: E3 - Aboard The Glacier Express, From Zermatt To Saint Moritz
programme.desc: The Glacier Express lays claim to being Switzerland's slowest express train. From the Matterhorn to Engandin, it offers its passengers an unforgettable voyage between Zermatt and Saint Moritz, a journey that includes 291 bridges, 91 tunnels and a chance to appreciate some truly breathtaking scenery.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: Discovering the treasures of the French regions, the initiatives and people who bring them to life.

programme.title: E12 - Lvmh At Salle Pleyel/White Chocolate/Scad Lacoste/Sequins
programme.desc: LVMH drops its bags in the Salle Pleyel, presenting all its skills and craftsmanship. All about white chocolate. An American school in the Luberon: SCAD Lacoste trains the artists of tomorrow, guided by fashion designer Julien Fournier. Sparkle and glitter is back in fashion: how to wear sequins.

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva, a kind-hearted young woman, discovers she is the true heir to the wealthy Cortes family. As she fights for justice and her identity, she falls in love with Inno, a member of the same family. Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: Walang Awa Kung Pumatay
programme.desc: Narding, orphaned at a young age after his policeman father is killed, grows up entangled in gang life. When he becomes involved with his boss's daughter-who is later murdered-he is wrongfully accused, forcing him into a violent path shaped by betrayal and survival.

programme.title: E3 - The Payoff
programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: E2 - Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Take a walk on the wild side with Zoologist Chris Humfrey as he delves into the fascinating world of Australian wildlife. Learn about each animals classification, adaptations, habitats, ecological niche and fun facts.

Cognizant Classic in The Palm Beaches
Gorgeous
programme.desc: C.N. faces his greatest challenge when he meets young country girl Bu and falls in love! But when Howie sets a trap for him, C.N. must prepare to fight for his lady and his life!

programme.title: Royal Warriors
programme.desc: When a Hong Kong policewoman, a Japanese Interpol agent and an air security officer botch a plane hijacking attempt by a militia fanatic, his veteran friends vow revenge. In order to stop the terrorist attacks and also to save their own lives, the three heroes must team up once again to fight their gun-toting adversaries.

programme.title: Tiger Cage II
programme.desc: David is a young lawyer who launders money for a gang leader in Chinatown. He is robbed and his assistant got killed when he carries a large sum of cash to Hong Kong. David turns to Waise, his law school buddy, for help. He doesn't realize that it is Waise who sets up the robbery. Petty, Waise's partner in the law firm, finds out that Waise has conducted some illegal activities. Before she could unveil the truth to the police, Petty is murdered. To cover up the truth, Waise finds Mandy, a promising solicitor, as scapegoat of Petty's death. Waise also sends out a gunman to track down Mandy. In a last minute rescue, Mandy is saved by one of her client, Dragon. She always finds the client obnoxious, but now she has to team up with Dragon to fight back and to prove her innocence at the same time...

programme.title: Royal Warriors
programme.desc: When a Hong Kong policewoman, a Japanese Interpol agent and an air security officer botch a plane hijacking attempt by a militia fanatic, his veteran friends vow revenge. programme.title: One Last Bloom
programme.desc: Forty years after leaving Japan for a boxing career in the U.S. that never panned out, Jin returns to restart his life with his old boxing buddies. When hotheaded young boxer Shogo asks for Jin's help to get him back into the ring after an unfair loss, the two men decide to seize their final chance at glory.

programme.title: Insanity
programme.desc: Three years ago, FAN (LAU Ching Wan) had a schizophrenic breakdown and killed his wife (Michelle YE Xuan). He later attempted to commit suicide but was unsuccessful, and was eventually sentenced to rehabilitate in a psychiatric facility indefinitely. Dr. CHOW (HUANG Xiao Ming) is FAN's psychiatrist. He believes FAN is cured after 3-year treatment and is alone in opposition to all doctors' objections to discharge FAN. After releasing from the facility, FAN faces discrimination and misunderstanding and once again finds himself at the brink of collapse. One night, he mistakenly kills a drug addict on impulse. He is driven to despair and comes to Dr. CHOW for help.Having thought about it, Dr CHOW fears his career will be wrecked if it is uncovered and therefore helps FAN abscond. The concealment of the truth subtly snowballs into chaos as it triggers media criticism and attacks due to his missing murderous patient. In order to redeem himself, CHOW decides to cure FAN with a confi

programme.title: Keep Chasing: Following
programme.desc: Entering the houses with the key entrusted to him by the clients, 'Koo Jung-tae', a real estate agent with a hobby of spying on other people's lives. He becomes intrigued by SNS influencer 'Han Sora'. She posts a photo of a vegan salad while actually eating convenience store sausage, prompting him to begin spying on her closely. ‘Koo Jung-tae', eventually sneaks into ‘Han Sora's house, discovers her lifeless body on the sofa. Soon after, he starts receiving threats from someone who knows he was there. As homicide detective 'Oh Young-joo's investigation closes in on him, ‘Koo Jung-tae' is compelled to search for the real culprit using clues from 'Han Sora's social media and the people around her.
